subject: Last chance: Real-time writing support
previewText: Grab your seat for Thursday's session and learn to catch misconceptions before they stick.
module-4-0-0:
Hi {{ personalization_token('contact.firstname', 'fellow educator') }},

 

What would change in your classroom? Students could get feedback while they are writing. They do not have to wait until you finish grading.

 

⏳ This is your last chance to join us for:

Real-Time Writing Support with SchoolAI

🗓 Thursday, March 5
⏰ 4:00 – 4:30 PM

 

In just 30 minutes, you will see how SchoolAI Spaces help you:

  • Catch misconceptions before they stick
  • Support revision in real time
  • Empower stronger writers
  • Lighten your grading load

 

More feedback. Better writing. Less overwhelm.

 

See you Thursday!

 

Brittany, Stephanie, and the SchoolAI team

module-4-0-1.text: Grab your seat before we start
